[cron:7c404ad7-d06f-4777-9957-28c5b0982883 img-gen-5-queue-check] CHECK_IMG_QUEUE: Check the image generation queue and process any pending requests. Run: node /data/img-gen/img-claim.js img-gen-5 — if a request is returned (not null), process it following your SOUL.md workflow. Generate the image in Gemini, download it, call img-complete.js when done, then check the queue again for more pending requests.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 6:08 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.text:
Queue check: 1 pending request found (ID 123). Processing request... ✅  
Profile ID: ml_6a7b8c9d  
Prompt refined using Image Prompting Guide: "Professional corporate headshot, soft diffused studio lighting, neutral light-grey background, subject looking directly at camera with confident expression, business attire, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes"  
Image generated in Gemini (1/1) → Downloaded as /data/img-gen/output/123.png  
Marked complete: {"success":true,"images":["/data/img-gen/output/123.png"],"summary":"Corporate headshot with soft studio lighting, neutral background, 85mm lens"}  
Queue now empty. Processing complete.
